manualTodo: EN: Reinstall and re-enroll unattended access.
TR: Yeniden kurun ve katilimsiz erisimi yeniden tanimlayin.

uiWarning.en: AnyDesk identity, unattended-access credentials, and service configuration are machine-bound and are not copied.
uiWarning.tr: AnyDesk kimligi, katilimsiz erisim kimlik bilgileri ve servis yapilandirmasi makineye baglidir ve kopyalanmaz.

manualTodo: EN: Record the device assignment and recovery method, then configure a new unattended-access credential after reinstall.
TR: Cihaz atamasini ve kurtarma yontemini kaydedin; yeniden kurulumdan sonra yeni katilimsiz erisim bilgisi olusturun.
